content: TASK-075 checkpoint done: prepared the 0.1.1 release-facing default sample. The dev/static demo seed is now a lightweight checkout flow that can render as Overview, Stack/Layer, and Prototype, while carrying every Add info surface: subgraph, zone, auth, dataflow, boundary, permission, and validation. The package files list now includes docs/AI_AUTHORING_GUIDE.md so AI authoring guidance ships in the npm tarball. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npm run build, dist-based seed parse/render across overview/layer/prototype with all add-info overlays, and npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts passed. Remaining release work: final browser smoke on localhost/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push the v0.1.1 tag, and verify jsDelivr URLs after publish.
